title: Compliance
full_text:
4.1.1.3 Compliance
Compliance
1) Compliance with this Part shall be achieved by following
  a) the prescriptive path described in Section 4.2.,
  b) the trade-off path described in Section 4.3., or
  c) the performance path described in Section 4.4. (see Note A-3.1.1.3.(1)(c)).
(See Note A-4.1.1.3.(1).)

sentences.text: Compliance with this Part shall be achieved by following

the trade-off path described in Section 4.3., or
the performance path described in Section 4.4. (see Note A-3.1.1.3.(1)(c)). (See Note A-4.1.1.3.(1).)
